name: studio.get_media
description: Fetch metadata for a single media asset by id. Returns URL, mime type, size, dimensions, and upload timestamp.
whenToUse: Agent has a media_id (from list_media or a page reference) and needs the CDN URL + dimensions before embedding.
Accessibility audit: fetch each referenced asset to confirm alt_text is present.
Cache refresh: re-read a single asset's metadata after an external upload job completes.
whenNotToUse: Caller has no media_id — use studio.list_media to discover assets first.
Caller wants the binary bytes — this skill is metadata-only; the returned URL can be fetched directly.
Caller wants to upload a new asset — out of scope; upload is not exposed as an agent skill in this pack.
